variables.notes: No line is explicitly labeled as cost of goods sold or cost of sales. The business appears R&D-heavy with minimal revenue, and operating expenses are grouped into overhead buckets (personnel, other operating expenses, R&D). To avoid misclassifying broad operating expenses as COGS, COGS is set to 0 (no separate COGS line).

variables.notes: Priority list reflects the most general interest expense line first ("Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest"), then the specific lease interest expense lines. Net finance income/expense and interest income items are excluded because XINT should capture gross interest expense, not net or income amounts.

variables.notes: There is no separate line for "equity attributable to owners/parent"; thus "Total Equity" is used for BE. No non-controlling interests line appears, so BE includes all equity, and MIB is set to 0.

No line corresponding to non-controlling interests or minority interest is present on the balance sheet. Therefore MIB is set to 0 (empty final_choice) and all equity is captured in BE via "Total Equity".
